feedback.text: I would find it important if it were also to be defined how it would legally affect the purchase of content (films, series, games) if a manufacturer simply switched off servers/remove content that a person has bought in the faith of a permanent, such as CDs/Bluerays etc. Unfortunately, in the last few years, there were some examples where purchased content was simply removed (Ubisoft – THE CREW or Sony 2023 where Discovery was removed from user accounts because SONY’s lizens for them had expired) and every ordinary person believed it was bought and not borrowed on the website.
